title: Global Entertainment Report
headline: Netflix Expands Live Content Strategy as Streaming Competition Intensifies
snapshot: Netflix is accelerating its push into live programming, signaling a major strategic shift in the streaming wars. The move reflects growing competition for audience engagement and retention.
key_storylines: Studios adjust strategies amid market pressure
Content becomes key battleground for subscribers
